Description: The Localizer is a utility class that stores localized bundles, resolves the active localization from the current language, listens to global application configuration changes, and emits an event when the language changes.

language.description: Indicates the normalized base language key currently used to resolve localization bundles. The value defaults to the normalized browser language at instantiation. Assigning the language expects a normalized base language key, updates the internal state, and triggers the 'onlanguagechange' event when the value changes.

initialized.description: Indicates whether the Localizer is currently listening for the global application configuration change event.

localizations.description: A dictionary of localization bundles keyed by language. Each key maps to a nested localization object for that language.

localization.description: The resolved active localization bundle. Resolution order is: normalized language key, English ('en'), then first available bundle.

initialize.description: Starts listening to the global 'appconfigchange' event on window. If already initialized, no change occurs.

dispose.description: Stops listening to the global 'appconfigchange' event on window. If not initialized, no change occurs.

setLanguage.description: Normalizes the supplied language and applies the normalized value to the 'language' state.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: The language or locale to normalize and apply to the Localizer.

onlanguagechange.description: Triggered when the Localizer language changes. The emitted detail contains the normalized base language key currently assigned to the Localizer.

parameters.name: detail
parameters.description: Contains the updated normalized base language key.

appconfigchange.description: Updates the Localizer language when a global application configuration change event is emitted on window and contains a 'language' value in its detail payload. Incoming language values are normalized before they are assigned to the Localizer.

triggers.condition: on window event 'appconfigchange' with detail.language defined

Resolution.description: Defines how the active localization bundle is resolved from the normalized language key.
